LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF PAUL LIU, AND, CINDY LIU MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT'S OPPOSITION UNTIMELY SERVED AND NOT CONSIDERED. HOWEVER, MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IS DENIED. PLAINTIFFS FAILED TO PROMPTLY EXERCISE QUIT CLAIM DEEDS. INSUFFICIENT SHOWING THAT PLAINTIFFS PERFORMED THEIR OBLIGATIONS UNDER THE AGREEMENT. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Enforce Settlement
Off Calendar Jul-30-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF PAUL LIU, and, CINDY LIU Motion to Enforce Settlement. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Defendant's opposition untimely served and not considered. However, Motion to enforce settlement agreement is denied. Plaintiffs failed to promptly exercise quit claim deeds. Insufficient showing that plaintiffs performed their obligations under the agreement. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders Cross-Complaint only dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Carl Sauceda CSR#2031. (212)
